title: Grilled Sausages with Saskatoon Berry Skewers
description: A classic German dish featuring sizzling sausages paired with sweet and tangy saskatoon berry skewers.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil. Brush the mixture onto both sides of the sausages.
3. Grill the sausages for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
4. Meanwhile, thread the saskatoon berries, onions, and bell peppers onto skewers. Brush with lemon juice and olive oil mixture.
5. Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the vegetables are tender.
6. Serve the sausages with the saskatoon berry skewers and a side of your choice.
